rowboat.name: Rowboat
rowboat.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 5 ft high
rowboat.description: A small open boat propelled by oars; seats a handful of passengers on calm water.

wagon.name: Wagon
wagon.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 10 ft high
wagon.description: A sturdy four-wheeled cargo wagon drawn by draft animals; the workhorse of overland trade.

carriage.name: Carriage
carriage.space: 10 ft long, 5 ft wide, 10 ft high
carriage.description: An enclosed passenger coach with suspension and seating, drawn by a team of horses.

sailing-ship.name: Sailing Ship
sailing-ship.space: 90 ft long, 20 ft wide, 20 ft high
sailing-ship.description: A three-masted merchant vessel for ocean voyages, carrying cargo, passengers, and a sizable crew.

warship.name: Warship
warship.space: 120 ft long, 30 ft wide, 25 ft high
warship.description: A heavy oceangoing warship with reinforced hull and mounts for siege weapons (ballistae, catapults).

airship.name: Airship
airship.space: 100 ft long, 30 ft wide, 40 ft high
airship.description: A gondola slung beneath a lifting envelope or magical apparatus, crossing the sky on long voyages.

flying-carpet.name: Magic Carpet
flying-carpet.description: An enchanted carpet that carries riders aloft on command; an invested magic item that flies at the pilot's direction.

magic-broom.name: Flying Broom
magic-broom.description: An enchanted broom that flies on command, carrying one rider (and a light load).
